latestNotes:
Installation

Boon Lay - 8nos bollards installation completed 30/12/25, pending reflective band before submitting work done form for Client to endorse.
AMK - 7nos. bollards anchor rods installation comepleted 05 Jan 26, site measurement taken on 06 Jan 26. Bollards delivery will need to unload at site office and manually jack to Berth (Day Works). Will check on site 07 Jan 26 for site access and check with Site PM if Sat (Day) able to unload directly at Berth Area.

Eric - Emailed to Main PM (Yao Hsien) to confirm if concurrent installation and lab test (By Maincon) for alternative anchor rods (by other supplier) as per site instruction, should lab test fail,  LYS will not bear any liability and removal of installed anchors will be considered as VO. Pending PM to confirm before proceed to order.

To check with Hilti on urgent air freight shipment ETA. Should arrive by this week according to Hilti last update.

latestNotes:
Highlighted to Client on Crash Rated Wall Materials ready for delivery and MOS shows clearly required 2 casting (Footing beam and Wall)

- Client highlighted crash rated wall erection based on (16mL every cycle), ready for site marking and installation.
- Arranged for site marking on 6th Jan 2026, Highlighted in groupchat for maincon surveyor to provide reference point for bollard centre reference point before we arrange for site marking.
- Highlighted to Maincon due to their internal boundary ramp slope from lowest point GL 3.1m - 3.6m, Top wall FFL to maintain at 4.2m
- External Boundary maintain at GL 3.0m throughout, crash rated wall from 800mmH will need to increase to 1.2mH, Vincent (Precision) is checking back with PE regarding if existing footing design is sufficient to hold the wall extension loading before providing rebar details.
- To submit revised dwg for SP30 Crash Rated Bollards Footings at Water Transfer Tank area as footing design clash with existing slab.
- To submit revised dwg for SP30 Crash Rated Bollards along Corporation Road as it clash with drainage wall and top slab (Rebar detail for Tie back)
